title: Ender Shards Craft Ender Pearls
description: Craft ender pearls by collecting ender shards from mob drops.
body:
**🔮 Ender Shards**
Ender Shards adds a simple and balanced way to obtain Ender Pearls without relying only on Endermen.

Mobs (including friendly mobs) now have a chance to drop Ender Shards when killed.
Collect 9 Ender Shards and craft them together to create 1 Ender Pearl.

Perfect for:

Early-game progression

Peaceful or low-Enderman worlds

Modpacks that want easier Ender Pearl access without being OP

✨ Simple, vanilla-friendly, and fully balanced.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔮 Ender Shards – Drop Rates ender pearl**
Every killed mob has a 20% chance to drop 1 Ender Shard
Friendly mobs are included (cows, pigs, sheep, etc.)

Hostile mobs also drop shards (zombies, skeletons, creepers, etc.)
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ca0466c9b11f2a2dca80a7a1f859f46a1c6c5f.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
